evidence_summary: Round-238 adds a private MLF.Primitive.Inventory owner for builtin type and primitive signature facts, rewires the selected frontend/backend adapters to consume it, documents the remaining lowerer-local wrapper/runtime-name boundary, leaves src-public and milestone-2/CLI surfaces untouched, preserves the inherited no-second-interface/no-fallback/cyclic-search boundaries, and passes git diff --check, focused primitive/backend/guard selectors, and cabal build all && cabal test with 2579 examples and 0 failures. Milestone-1 should advance to in-progress, not done, because the selected item intentionally leaves broader lowering/runtime adapter migration for later milestone-1 work.

completion_pointers.text: round-238 created MLF.Primitive.Inventory, migrated the selected frontend/backend adapters to that private owner, kept lowerer wrapper/runtime implementation details local, and passed focused primitive checks plus the full cabal gate.

history_entries.text: round-238 advanced milestone-1 in-progress by creating the private primitive inventory owner, migrating the selected frontend/backend adapters, and passing focused primitive checks plus the full cabal gate.
